mapper.select: SELECT id, produce_id AS produceId, operation, flow_name AS flowName, plate_no AS plateNo, hole_no AS holeNo, template_plate_no AS templatePlateNo, template_hole_no AS templateHoleNo, layout, hole_number AS holeNumber, origin_concentration AS originConcentration, return_state AS returnState, remark, operator, operate_time AS operateTime, before_flow_name AS beforeFlowName FROM yk_sample_flow_log WHERE produce_id = #{produceId} ORDER BY operate_time ASC
